shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character airborne state when jumping over obstacles
context.screen_position: Fixed x=100px, y varies from 0 to ~90px above ground during jump arc
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when player presses Space/Tap to jump, remains until landing on ground

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur with both feet off ground

animation.description: Single static frame showing jump pose - both legs tucked, body slightly arched

visual_specification.details: Both feet lifted off ground, legs slightly bent, tail curved upward, eyes open

relationships.shared_with: Same dimensions as player_run and player_idle
relationships.differences_from: player_run is animated (2 frames), player_duck has different dimensions (118x60px)

explicit_negations: No motion blur or jump trails
No additional jump effects or particles
No shadow on ground during airborne state
